info.description: This is GNS Backend API server.
info.title: GNS Backend API

post.description: Change the password for the currently logged-in user
Login with email and password to get JWT token
Logout the current user and invalidate tokens
Login using Google OAuth ID Token

get.description: Get the profile of the currently logged-in user

put.description: Update the profile information for the current user

post.description: Get a new access token using a refresh token
Register a new user with email and password

get.description: Get a paginated list of guest categories with optional search

post.description: Create a new guest category with name and optional start/end times

get.description: Get a single guest category by its ID

put.description: Update an existing guest category by its ID

delete.description: Delete a guest category by its ID

post.description: Check if the user has access to a specific action on a module
Check if the currently logged-in user has a specific permission

get.description: Get a list of all existing permissions

post.description: Create a new permission for a module

get.description: Get all permissions grouped by their respective modules
Get detailed information about a permission
Get a list of all existing roles
Get detailed information about a role

delete.description: Permanently delete a role (non-system roles only)

get.description: Get all module access configurations for a role

post.description: Update specific module permissions (view, create, edit, delete) for a role

get.description: Get all permissions assigned to a specific role

post.description: Assign multiple permissions to a specific role

get.description: Get all roles assigned to a user

post.description: Assign multiple roles to a user

get.description: Get a paginated list of users (Admin only)

post.description: Create a new user by an admin

get.description: Get a paginated list of soft-deleted users
Get detailed information for a specific user

put.description: Update user information by an admin
